title: Benjamin Franklin Cummings Institute of Technology
body: Benjamin Franklin Cummings Institute of Technology (Franklin Cummings Tech) is a private college in Boston, Massachusetts. It focuses on technology and trades programs and was established in 1908 with funds bequeathed in Benjamin Franklin's will.
